case_title: RAND INC VS. ONE LINK CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT OF SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT-ISSUED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAND INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ONE LINK CORPORATION FROMAL, DAVID $39,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $4,208.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,081.00 INTEREST, $335.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $44,624.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
